_comment: Single source of truth for the /grant dashboard. Edit the `current` numbers after each event/office-hours/install/interview and redeploy. Pace (on track / at risk / behind) is computed from program.start..program.end vs today at build time. Numbers reconciled to the June 15 2026 context export (ZCG grant #266). Do NOT put compensation/milestone-dollar figures here: this page is public.

kpis.label: Wallet activations
kpis.note: Activation = first shielded tx, then $5 ZEC. Captured via /airdrops. THE headline KPI and currently the one behind pace.

kpis.label: Merchant POS installs
kpis.note: Counts at LIVE only (real payment clears), not LOI/demo. 7 LOIs signed, 6 in pipeline. Convert one more to hit target.

ongoing.label: Onboarding materials
ongoing.detail: 60s guide, QR posters, banners, shirts. Print run ongoing.
